name: Regie.ai
description: AI sales engagement platform with prospecting agents, multi-channel outreach and workflow automation for GTM teams.

seo.title: Regie.ai — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Regie.ai: AI sales engagement platform with prospecting agents, multi-channel outreach and workflow automation for GTM teams.

when_to_use: Multi-channel sales outreach automation for GTM teams
AI-written prospecting sequences personalized per account
Workflow automation connecting intent signals to outreach
AI sales engagement platform for pipeline generation at scale
Automated follow-up cadences triggered by CRM stage changes

pros: AI-generated sequences tuned to rep persona
Workflow automation covers full SDR motion
cons: AI content still needs editing to feel human
Crowded category: Outreach, Salesloft, Apollo compete
Enterprise plans expensive for small teams
Integrations deepest with Salesforce, weaker elsewhere
review.verdict: Solid AI-augmented sequencing tool; differentiation vs incumbents narrows every quarter.
review.best_for: SDR teams already running structured multi-channel outbound
review.not_for: Founders testing outbound motion on a tight budget
